name: cynical-sally
description: Brutally honest code reviews: scores, real issues, and usable fixes. CLI + MCP server.
long_description: Cynical Sally is a brutally honest senior-engineer code reviewer for Claude Code, Cursor & Windsurf. She gives a 0–10 score, evidence-backed issues, and fixes you can actually use. 8 tools: roast, explain, review-pr, refactor, brainstorm, frontend, marketing, and usage. Free tier, no account needed.

tools.name: sally_roast
tools.description: Brutally honest code review with a 0-10 score, evidence-backed issues, and fixes

tools.name: sally_explain
tools.description: Explain what code actually does, in plain English

tools.name: sally_review_pr
tools.description: Review a PR diff like a senior engineer

tools.name: sally_brainstorm
tools.description: Honest feedback on an idea or architecture
